articles.title: Large crowd turns out for Boston Legacy, but debut game ends with loss to defending NWSL champion
articles.description:
Over 30,000 fans gathered at Gillette Stadium to witness the inaugural game.

The post Large crowd turns out for Boston Legacy, but debut game ends with loss to defending NWSL champion appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Over 30,000 fans attended Boston Legacy's inaugural game at Gillette Stadium.
Boston Legacy faced the defending NWSL champion in their debut match.
The event highlights growing support for women's soccer in Boston.
